w:r.w:t: Beat the Market: An Effective Intraday Momentum Strategy for the S&P500 ETF (SPY)
This code allows you to replicate the results presented in the paper "
Beat the Market: An Effective Intraday Momentum Strategy for the S&P500 ETF (SPY)
" published by ConcretumGroup founder, Carlo Zarattini.
For detailed explanations, please refer to the full
You can reach the authors of this code by email at info@concretumgroup.com.
More information can be found at
